title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes: This game needs to be started using a 32bit wine prefix. I believe this is not mentioned and explained enough around here. You need to install wine32 and, for convenience, winetricks. Remove the default pfx folder  from ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/225080 and run this command in the terminal to create a 32bit prefix: "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/225080/pfx WINEARCH=32". You have successfully tricked Proton into starting your game in 32bit Wine. Now you can run this command to install the necessary dependencies: "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/225080/pfx winetricks -q corefonts dotnet40 tahoma 3". Don't forget to set "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%" in the games' launch options and you're good to go.
title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes: Runs fine after installing corefonts, dotnet40 and tahoma via winetricks, forcing a second installation and disabling esync.

notes: At first this did not run at all for me. But if you have a working prefix for a game like Batman Arkham Asylum, just copy that one into this game's prefix folder, click play, be patient while it does its first-time setup and eventually it will run fine just like in Windows!
